title: Expand denominations/ranges; publish expanded verified set
context: The initial core set covers the most commonly needed configurations (halves through twelfths for fractions; integer and basic fraction number lines; standard unit/rod/flat blocks). After the core set is distributed and beneficiary validation is complete, learner and educator feedback typically identifies gaps: additional fraction denominators (thirteenths through twentieths), number-line ranges beyond 0-20, or mixed-unit number lines. This task expands the verified set based on actual feedback.
objective: Expand the verified core set with additional denominations and ranges identified from beneficiary validation feedback, generate and verify all new variants, and publish through the confirmed channel.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one new configuration per family is added based on findings from math-manip-research-004 (beneficiary validation); expansion choices are documented with the feedback that motivated them.
All new PDFs pass the automated dimensional and relationship verification harness.
Physical print tests are completed for representative new variants (at least one new variant per family).
Expanded set is distributed through the confirmed channel with updated listing; attribution and license records updated.
Zero license violations in any new content.
resources: tasks/math-manip-research-004.json -- beneficiary validation findings driving expansion choices
output: Expanded PDF output set in output/expanded-set/, with verification reports and physical print-test records, in a pull request, CC-BY-4.0.
